fault_hypothesis: On line 63, the mean is computed by dividing by `window` (the requested window size) instead of `len(recent)` (the actual number of available samples). When fewer samples exist than the window, this produces an incorrect (too-small) mean.

constraints.intent: The computed mean must equal total divided by the actual number of samples, not by the window size.

spec.expr: len(recent__1) == window or abs(mean__1 * len(recent__1) - total__1) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: After computing mean, mean * len(recent) should equal total unless window equals len(recent).
Before returning mean, it must reflect the average of the actual available samples.
The returned value after the warmup branch must be the mean of actual samples.
